title: Puttur Shree Mahalingeshwara Temple
tagline: Puttur Shree Mahalingeshwara Temple — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: Puttur Shree Mahalingeshwara Temple is a 12th-century temple, located in Puttur, Dakshina Kannada in the Indian state of Karnataka.
overview.description: Puttur Shree Mahalingeshwara Temple is a 12th-century temple, located in Puttur, Dakshina Kannada in the Indian state of Karnataka. Lord Shiva (popularly known as Puttur Mahalingeshwara) is the main deity.

topPlaces.name: Shivarama Karantha Balavana
topPlaces.description: The Shivarama Karantha Balavana is notable for its fame under the name of Jnanapeeta awardee Kota Shivarama Karanthar, who lived in Puttur. His home now houses a museum, a park, and a recreation center.

topPlaces.name: Puttur, Karnataka
topPlaces.description: Puttur (Pronunciation:) is a city in the Dakshina Kannada district of Karnataka state in India. The Puttur Shree Mahalingeshwara Temple is located here.

topPlaces.name: Syro-Malankara Catholic Eparchy of Puthur
topPlaces.description: The Syro-Malankara Catholic Eparchy of Puthur (or - Puttur) (also called Puthur of the Syro-Malankars), the first Syro-Malankara Catholic diocese in India's southern Karnataka, is a suffragan in the ecclesiastical province of the Metropolitan Syro-Malankara Catholic Archeparchy of Tiruvalla, which depends on the Major Archbishop of Trivandrum, the head of the Syro-Malankara Catholic Church (Antiochian Rite Eastern Catholic particular church in Syriac and Malayalam languages), and with it on the Roman Congregation for the Oriental Churches. Its episcopal see is the St.

topPlaces.name: Aryapu (Rural)
topPlaces.description: Aryapu (Rural) is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Puttur taluk of Dakshina Kannada district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Kolthige
topPlaces.description: Kolthige or Koltige is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Puttur taluk of Dakshina Kannada district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Kodimbala
topPlaces.description: Kodimbala is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Puttur taluk of Dakshina Kannada district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Koila
topPlaces.description: Koila is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Puttur taluk of Dakshina Kannada district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Kudippady
topPlaces.description: Kudipady, also called Pallataru-Kodipady, Kidippady, or Kudipadi is a village in the Puttur Taluk of Dakshina Kannada district, in Karnataka, India. It is 6 km to the west of the larger town of Puttur and 4 km south of the town of Kabaka.

The Syro-Malankara Catholic Eparchy of Puthur (or - Puttur) (also called Puthur of the Syro-Malankars), the first Syro-Malankara Catholic diocese in India's southern Karnataka, is a suffragan in the ecclesiastical province of the Metropolitan Syro-Malankara Catholic Archeparchy of Tiruvalla, which depends on the Major Archbishop of Trivandrum, the head of the Syro-Malankara Catholic Church (Antiochian Rite Eastern Catholic particular church in Syriac and Malayalam languages), and with it on the Roman Congregation for the Oriental Churches. Its episcopal see is the St.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Puttur Shree Mahalingeshwara Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Puttur Shree Mahalingeshwara Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Puttur Shree Mahalingeshwara Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (40 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (40 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Puttur Shree Mahalingeshwara Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Puttur Shree Mahalingeshwara Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Puttur Shree Mahalingeshwara Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Puttur Shree Mahalingeshwara Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Puttur Shree Mahalingeshwara Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Shivarama Karantha Balavana, Puttur, Karnataka, Syro-Malankara Catholic Eparchy of Puthur, Aryapu (Rural), Kolthige.
